name: Tofu
story: Tofu was the smallest of his litter and is now the softest. He likes slow mornings, warm laundry, and being carried like a baguette.
Loud noises aren't his thing — a calm household would let this gentle boy bloom. He is happiest within arm's reach of his person.

medical.notes: Fully vetted. Hearing tested — normal. Indoor-only recommended.

photoAlt: Tofu, a white kitten with soft grey tabby patches, standing on a fluffy blanket
